name: Feature Standard
description: Workflow chuẩn cho feature: Shape, Recon, Decide trước spec; sau đó execute, sync, verify implementation, rồi verify runtime.

steps.title: Shape
steps.hint: Làm rõ expectation, happy path, must-not-happen, và rough size

steps.title: Recon
steps.hint: Check behavior hiện tại, pattern gần nhất, constraint, và conflict

steps.title: Decide
steps.hint: Chọn: write spec / ask / slice / spike / conflict

steps.title: Create spec
steps.hint: Gõ /create-spec "mô tả feature" sau khi đã shape, recon, decide

steps.title: Verify feature
steps.hint: Yêu cầu agent verify implementation theo latest synced spec
